widgets._comment: 2. Google Analytics SDK — 只加载一次
3. Google Analytics 初始化 — 依赖 SDK 加载完成（v3 会真正等待）
4. Cookie Modal — EU 用户显示弹窗，非 EU 直接 grant
widgets.content:
(function(){var debug=location.search.includes('debug-consent=1');var isEU=debug?true:(window.__isEU===true);if(debug){console.log('[cookie] debug mode');localStorage.removeItem('cookie_consent');}function getConsent(){try{var raw=localStorage.getItem('cookie_consent');if(!raw)return null;var d=JSON.parse(raw);if(typeof d==='string')return d;if(Date.now()-d.ts>1000*60*60*24*180){localStorage.removeItem('cookie_consent');return null;}return d.value;}catch(e){return null;}}function setConsent(v){localStorage.setItem('cookie_consent',JSON.stringify({value:v,ts:Date.now()}));}function grant(){if(window.gtag)gtag('consent','update',{ad_storage:'granted',analytics_storage:'granted',ad_user_data:'granted',ad_personalization:'granted'});}function deny(){if(window.gtag)gtag('consent','update',{ad_storage:'denied',analytics_storage:'denied',ad_user_data:'denied',ad_personalization:'denied'});}var saved=getConsent();if(!isEU){grant();if(window.__ads_loadAds)window.__ads_loadAds();return;}if(saved==='accepted'){grant();if(window.__ads_loadAds)window.__ads_loadAds();return;}if(saved==='rejected'){deny();return;}var overlay=document.createElement('div');overlay.style.cssText='position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.45);z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;';var modal=document.createElement('div');modal.style.cssText='background:#fff;width:520px;max-width:92%;border-radius:16px;padding:22px 24px;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25);font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Segoe UI,Roboto,sans-serif;';modal.innerHTML="
🍪 We respect your privacy
We use cookies and JavaScript to make this website work properly, remember your preferences, and improve your experience.
We may also use them to understand how the site is used and keep our content free.
We do not collect sensitive personal data. Learn more in our Privacy Policy.
";overlay.appendChild(modal);document.body.appendChild(overlay);modal.querySelector('#cookie-accept').onclick=function(){setConsent('accepted');grant();overlay.remove();if(window.__ads_loadAds)window.__ads_loadAds();};modal.querySelector('#cookie-reject').onclick=function(){setConsent('rejected');deny();overlay.remove();};})();

widgets._comment: 5. Adsense Loader — 暴露 __ads_loadAds，由 cookie-modal 或自身调用
widgets.content: (function(){if(window.__ads_loader_init)return;window.__ads_loader_init=true;function getConsent(){try{var raw=localStorage.getItem('cookie_consent');if(!raw)return null;var d=JSON.parse(raw);if(typeof d==='string')return d;if(Date.now()-d.ts>1000*60*60*24*180){localStorage.removeItem('cookie_consent');return null;}return d.value;}catch(e){return null;}}function loadAds(){if(window.__ads_loaded)return;window.__ads_loaded=true;var s=document.createElement('script');s.src='https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-2572770204602497';s.async=true;s.crossOrigin='anonymous';s.onload=function(){window.dispatchEvent(new Event('adsense:ready'));};document.head.appendChild(s);var amp=document.createElement('script');amp.async=true;amp.setAttribute('custom-element','amp-auto-ads');amp.src='https://cdn.ampproject.org/v0/amp-auto-ads-0.1.js';document.head.appendChild(amp);if(document.body&&!document.querySelector('amp-auto-ads')){var autoAds=document.createElement('amp-auto-ads');autoAds.setAttribute('type','adsense');autoAds.setAttribute('data-ad-client','ca-pub-2572770204602497');document.body.appendChild(autoAds);}}window.__ads_loadAds=loadAds;var isEU=window.__isEU===true;var saved=getConsent();if(!isEU)loadAds();else if(saved==='accepted')loadAds();})();
<ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display:block;margin:16px 0" data-ad-client="ca-pub-2572770204602497" data-ad-slot="6861657091" data-ad-format="auto" data-full-width-responsive="true"></ins>

widgets._comment: 7. 中间广告 — 按文本量智能插入到 ._page 内容中间
widgets.content: (function(){var page=document.querySelector('._page');if(!page)return;if(page.querySelector('ins.adsbygoogle[data-ad-slot="6879550993"]'))return;var AD_HTML='<ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display:block;margin:32px 0" data-ad-client="ca-pub-2572770204602497" data-ad-layout="in-article" data-ad-slot="6879550993" data-ad-format="fluid"></ins>';var BLOCK='H1,H2,H3,H4,H5,H6,PRE,CODE,TABLE,FIGURE,BLOCKQUOTE,UL,OL,DETAILS,SUMMARY';var MIN_CHARS=200;var children=Array.from(page.children).filter(function(el){var tag=el.tagName;return tag!=='SCRIPT'&&tag!=='STYLE'&&tag!=='INS';});var total=children.reduce(function(s,el){return s+(el.textContent||'').trim().length;},0);if(total<MIN_CHARS*2){return;}var half=total/2;var acc=0;var insertAfter=null;for(var i=0;i<children.length;i++){var el=children[i];var len=(el.textContent||'').trim().length;var prevAcc=acc;acc+=len;if(acc<total*0.3)continue;if(acc>=half){var closer=Math.abs(prevAcc-half)<Math.abs(acc-half)?i-1:i;closer=Math.max(0,Math.min(closer,children.length-2));var candidate=children[closer];if(candidate.matches(BLOCK)&&closer+1<children.length-1)closer++;insertAfter=children[closer];break;}}if(!insertAfter)insertAfter=children[Math.floor(children.length/2)-1];if(!insertAfter)return;var wrap=document.createElement('div');wrap.innerHTML=AD_HTML;insertAfter.insertAdjacentElement('afterend',wrap.firstElementChild);})();
<ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display:block;margin:16px 0" data-ad-client="ca-pub-2572770204602497" data-ad-slot="1992473792" data-ad-format="auto" data-full-width-responsive="true"></ins>

widgets._comment: 9. 广告统一初始化 — 等 adsense:ready 事件后 push 所有 ins
10. Lazy Load — 滚动时补推未初始化的 ins
